# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/servicePrincipals
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    name: <service_principal_name>
    properties:
      displayName: <service_principal_display_name>

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
    name: <role_assignment_name>
    properties:
      principalId: <service_principal_id>
      roleDefinitionId: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/24962a5f-53c1-4cc7-b1df-502e4e47c7f5
      scope: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>
